title: Choose Path · 1💗1

plaque.title: We'd love to know you
plaque.sub: How would you like to integrate into the Rikma network of 1💗1?

tile_info: This affects what we offer — we match the pace to who you are.

provider.title: Want to offer skills and join a Rikma
provider.sub: Let's build a profile displaying your capabilities, to integrate as an equal partner in Rikmas (consensual partnerships), participate in voting and profit sharing, or provide a collective response to client demands.
provider.meta: ~ 4 min · Profile built from CV or manually

business.title: Have a business or a project idea
business.sub: Set up a new Rikma (consensual partnership) or wrap an existing business — to recruit equal partners, manage profits and decisions together, and above all connect directly to a stream of clients and projects in the system.
business.meta: ~ 5 min · Extracted from site or free description

done.title: You've Arrived! · 1💗1

plaque.title: So glad you made it!
plaque.sub: Your profile is live and breathing

done.info:
🎉 Profile saved. The Concierge is already starting to look for matches, potential Rikmas and client wishes.
Where to continue from here?

matches.title: To your profile + user guide
matches.sub: The Concierge is already looking for matching Rikmas and client demands. Let's learn how to manage a consensual partnership on the go.
matches.meta: Recommended — The natural way to continue

business.title: Set up a Rikma (Partnership)
business.sub: Have a project idea, product or partnership? It's time to set up a Rikma, recruit partners and connect to client projects in the system.
business.meta: Can also be done later from profile

plaque.title: How shall we start building?
plaque.sub: One method · Can be edited later

cv.title: Upload CV
cv.sub: AI will extract your skills and experience from the CV to match you with suitable Rikmas and projects.

describe.title: Describe in your own words
describe.sub: Write freely about your skills, desires and experience. The AI will connect you with suitable Rikmas.

cv_page.title: Upload CV · 1💗1

plaque.title: Drag CV here
plaque.sub: Everything stays with us · Nothing is exposed

cv_page.info: ✨ The AI will extract your skills and experience from the CV — so we can offer you suitable Rikmas and consensual co-management. You can always edit.

describe_page.title: Tell about yourself · 1💗1

plaque.title: Tell us about yourself
plaque.sub: AI will extract skills and values to match you with suitable Rikmas

describe_page.info: ✨ 2-3 free paragraphs: what are your skills, which Rikmas are you interested in joining as an equal partner, and what value do you wish to bring.
describe_page.label: Your story
describe_page.placeholder: Example: Fullstack development with 5 years of experience. Interested in joining early-stage startups as a technology partner, especially in education and health. Daily routine involves React & Node.js, database design and lead development...

review_page.title: Confirm Profile · 1💗1

plaque.title: Here's what we found
plaque.sub: Mark what is correct · Everything can be edited

missions.label: Missions you are capable of doing
missions.hint: Click on a mission to remove · It can be edited and added later

resources.label: 📦 Resources to share
resources.hint: Physical items in your possession that can be offered — click to select

review_page.next_hint: In editing we will add more values, refine skills, select missions and resources from the lists on the site. You can always edit from the profile.

plaque.title: Tell us about your Rikma
plaque.sub: Consensual partnership, profit sharing and direct connection to clients

url.title: I have a website or business page
url.sub: Paste URL — AI will set up the Rikma, define areas of activity, and extract matches for partners and client projects.

describe.title: Describe in your own words
describe.sub: 2-3 free paragraphs. Write about the Rikma, your needs and how you'd like to address client projects.
describe.meta: ~ 2 min · AI will build a draft

url_page.title: Paste Link to Rikma · 1💗1
url_page.info: ⚡ AI will read the page and automatically set up the Rikma, including the project name, description, and required skills for partners — you can always edit.
url_page.label: Link

describe_page.title: Describe Rikma · 1💗1

plaque.title: Tell us about the Rikma
plaque.sub: AI will build a Rikma draft, partner definitions and matching client projects

describe_page.info: ✨ 2-3 free paragraphs: about your Rikma or project, what kind of partners you need, and what skills would complement you.
describe_page.label: Description
describe_page.placeholder: Example: Setting up a Rikma (partnership) connecting local farmers to direct consumers. Partner needed to lead marketing and sales, with experience in community management and social networks. Equal partnership offered, including consensual decision-making and structured profit sharing...
